description: Binary success criteria extracted from skill files for automated enforcement

gsd-planner.check: Every ROADMAP requirement ID mapped to a plan
Each plan has 2-3 tasks with complete XML structure
gsd-planner.script: for f in .planning/phases/**/*-PLAN.md; do grep -c '<task' "$f" | awk '{if ($1 < 2 || $1 > 3) exit 1}'; done

gsd-planner.check: Wave numbers computed from depends_on graph
must_haves.truths are observable by end user
No file appears in parallel plans (exclusive ownership)
gsd-planner.script: for wave in $(grep -h '^wave:' .planning/phases/**/*-PLAN.md | sort -u); do grep -h 'files_modified:' .planning/phases/**/*-PLAN.md | sort | uniq -d; done

gsd-executor.check: SUMMARY.md exists at .planning/phases/*/ and is > 100 bytes
STATE.md updated timestamp is within last 5 minutes
No files modified outside paths listed in PLAN.md scope
gsd-executor.pass: /* requires manual verification against PLAN.md files_modified */

gsd-executor.check: Exit with structured completion format containing all commit hashes

gsd-debugger.check: Debug file created IMMEDIATELY on command
Each hypothesis is specific and falsifiable

gsd-debugger.script: grep -c '## Evidence' DEBUG.md && grep -A100 '## Evidence' DEBUG.md | grep -c '- checked:'

gsd-debugger.check: Root cause identified with supporting evidence
Fix verified against original reproduction steps
Human confirms fix works in real environment

gsd-verifier.check: Each must-have has PASS/FAIL status with evidence
All artifacts checked at 3 levels (exists, substantive, wired)

gsd-verifier.pass: /* output may be empty if no anti-patterns found */
/* output may be empty if all automated */

gsd-verifier.check: If gaps_found: structured gap list in YAML frontmatter

gsd-researcher.check: RESEARCH.md file exists at correct path
Every claim has source URL or Context7 reference
Confidence levels assigned to all sections
User constraints section present if CONTEXT.md exists
Structured return provided: phase, confidence, key findings, file path

gsd-codebase-mapper.check: All relevant files explored for focus area
Every finding includes a file path in backticks

gsd-codebase-mapper.script: /* This checks agent response, not file output */

tdd-guide.check: No implementation code before corresponding test
Tests are independent (can run in any order)

security-reviewer.check: All HIGH issues addressed with fixes
security-reviewer.pass: /* each HIGH should have a Fix */

build-error-resolver.check: npm run build exits with code 0

doc-updater.check: All file paths verified to exist
doc-updater.script: grep -ohE '`[^`]+\.[a-z]+`' docs/CODEMAPS/*.md | tr -d '`' | while read f; do [ -f "$f" ] || echo "MISSING: $f"; done
/* requires extracting and testing code blocks */
grep -ohE '\[.*\]\(([^)]+)\)' docs/CODEMAPS/*.md | grep -oE '\([^)]+\)' | tr -d '()' | while read l; do [ -f "$l" ] || [ -d "$l" ] || echo "BROKEN: $l"; done

web-researcher.check: Confidence levels assigned to all findings
Sources section includes all URLs used

worker-deploy.check: npm run build exits with code 0
npm test shows all tests passing
No secrets grep matches in staged code

worker-image-gen.check: Prompt crafted with all relevant details
Image saved to specified local path
User satisfied with result (or iteration path clear)

discuss-phase.check: Scope creep was redirected to <deferred> section
Each decision is actionable by downstream agents
User explicitly approved or moved to next step

plan-phase.check: PLAN.md files have wave, depends_on, files_modified, autonomous frontmatter
plan-phase.script: for f in .planning/phases/**/*-PLAN.md; do grep -cE '^(wave|depends_on|files_modified|autonomous):' "$f" | awk '{if ($1 < 4) exit 1}'; done && echo 'OK'

plan-phase.check: Each plan has <tasks> in XML format
Each plan has must_haves for verification
All phase_req_ids appear in at least one plan's requirements field

execute-phase.check: All spot-checks pass (files exist, commits present, no self-check failures)
VERIFICATION.md status is passed or human_needed (not gaps_found)
ROADMAP.md phase checkbox marked [x] with date

execute-phase.script: git branch --list | grep -E 'phase-[0-9]+' | while read b; do git log -1 --format='%ci' "$b" | grep -v "$(date +%Y-%m)" && echo "ORPHAN: $b"; done

verify-phase.check: Must-haves established (from frontmatter, criteria, or derived)
Every artifact has level 1-3 check result
Every key link has wiring status
Status is one of: passed, gaps_found, human_needed
Orchestrator can route based on status

unify-phase.check: Reconciliation table shows PLANNED|ACTUAL|DELTA for all tasks
Acceptance criteria results documented with evidence
STATE.md updated with loop closure (UNIFY checkmark)
Deferred issues captured for future planning
User knows what to do next (next plan, phase complete, etc.)
No orphaned work - everything is documented or explicitly deferred

verification-integrity.check: Test output analyzed for actual execution (not 0 tests, not all skipped)
Build output analyzed for hidden errors (not just exit code)
Stub patterns searched in all relevant files
Four-level verification applied (exists, substantive, wired, functional)
Clear verdict: TRUSTWORTHY or NOT TRUSTWORTHY with evidence
Human verification flagged where automation cannot reach

docker-local-first.check: Container starts and stays running for 3+ seconds
docker-local-first.script: docker run -d --name test-container test:local && sleep 3 && docker ps -q -f name=test-container | grep -q . && echo 'OK'; docker rm -f test-container

docker-local-first.check: Health endpoint returns HTTP 200 within 30 seconds
docker-local-first.script: for i in $(seq 1 30); do [ "$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:$PORT/health)" = '200' ] && echo 'OK' && break; sleep 1; done

frontend-design.check: No emojis used as icons (use SVG instead)
All icons from consistent icon set (Heroicons/Lucide)
Hover states don't cause layout shift
Focus states visible for keyboard navigation
Light mode text has sufficient contrast (4.5:1 minimum)
Glass/transparent elements visible in light mode
No content hidden behind fixed navbars

pa-comparison.check: Output contains action: pass or intervene
Expected input files exist on disk
pa-comparison.script: jq -r '.expected_inputs[]' /tmp/pa_handoff.json | while read f; do [ -f "$f" ] || echo "MISSING: $f"; done

pa-comparison.check: Handoff context populated for pass action
Intervention includes target executor for intervene action

context-warden._description: Model-specific token thresholds. Context Warden kills at threshold unless task is >85% complete.

grace_period.reason: killing costs more than letting finish

checks.check: Token count retrieved from model API response
Kill threshold not exceeded (or grace period applies)
Fresh agent spawned with summary context

conductor-system.check: DAG JSON is valid and has steps array
No implementation code in conductor output

conductor-system.script: jq '[.dag.steps | group_by(.dependsOn | length) | .[] | length] | max' /tmp/conductor_output.json 2>/dev/null || echo '0'

intake.check: Structured brief produced as valid JSON
taskType is one of 5 allowed values
No technical jargon in user-facing messages

archivist.script: grep -A10 '## Tech Stack' PROJECT-ARCHIVE.md | grep -oE '(next|react|vue|svelte)' | head -1 > /tmp/arch_stack.txt && grep -oE '(next|react|vue|svelte)' package.json | head -1 > /tmp/pkg_stack.txt && diff /tmp/arch_stack.txt /tmp/pkg_stack.txt

archivist.check: llms.txt exists if project has HTML output
archivist.script: if ls dist/*.html 2>/dev/null || ls public/*.html 2>/dev/null; then ls llms.txt; fi

worker-backend.script: for f in src/routes/*.ts src/api/*.ts; do grep -L '(zod|yup|joi|validate)' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done | wc -l

worker-backend.check: Error responses don't expose stack traces
Routes return proper HTTP status codes

tiered-enforcement._description: Overhead budgets per tier. Keeps enforcement cost proportional to task complexity.
